description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to package BeamerPresenter for Ubuntu 22.04. The workflow should trigger on push with tags v* and on workflow dispatch. It should configure, build, and package the project with Qt5 and Qt6, using both MuPDF and Poppler, and upload the resulting DEB packages as artifacts. Additionally, it should build MuPDF from source and use it for packaging. Release the packages on tag push.
